name: Article Sprint (Floating Head + Article Receipts)
description: Ultra-low-cost 9:16 short (~35s): floating-head avatar (greenscreen Seedance cutout) speaks the hook over the article title, then a whip-scroll article runthrough with receipt cards per beat. VO = ELEVENLABS 'Brielle' (6u6JbqKdaQy89ENzLSju, eleven_v3, stability 0.35, ~$0.10/video) reading a SPOKEN_VO_HUMANIZER.md script — owner-approved take is sliced into hook (Seedance lip-sync reference) + body. MisoTTS demoted to future fine-tune/scale path (base checkpoint flattens prosody; see MISOTTS_RUNPOD_GUIDE.md §Prosody). v7 validated 2026-06-12.
best_for: DFY YouTube Shorts / Instagram Reels at scale (one per published article)
article promotion shorts: 'this new ranking/guide says X' + receipts
listicle articles with concrete numbers (prices, limits, counts)
any pipeline where ElevenLabs per-video cost is the bottleneck
not_for: videos needing the avatar on screen past the hook
topics with no published article to scroll
non-English voiceover (MisoTTS is English-only — use ElevenLabs path)

stages.title: Script + article capture (free, parallel with pod boot)
actions: Pick the TOPIC ANGLE first per HOOK_PLAYBOOK_ARTICLE_SPRINT.md section 0 (house default: F9 viral-entity delegation — make ONE real claude-opus-4-8 structured-output call with the article facts asking for ranked tool/tip picks + reasons + start-today choice; save the artifact with request_id; feature the 3 TTS-safe picks). THEN write the 6-beat script per the playbook: <=70 words, hook <=11 words stakes-word-first, one number per line, reversal in b4 (what the entity SKIPPED, receipt = the incumbent's price), withheld-crown CTA. Run the pre-flight checklist before any generation

Write the VO as ONE flowing spoken monologue per SPOKEN_VO_HUMANIZER.md (skill root): connected thoughts (so/and/'cause), one concrete you-benefit per item, varied sentence lengths, one emotion, CTA folded into the final thought. NEVER fragment chains or 'Label: description' constructions (the rejected v4-v6 style). ~85 words ≈ 33s; cut items rather than compress
Write numbers/brands phonetically for TTS ('one thirty seven', 'A.H. refs'); keep a display map for captions
Playwright (system chrome, mobile UA 540x960 dsf=2): full-page screenshot in <=3500-CSS-px clip SEGMENTS stitched with PIL — Chrome WRAPS full-page rasters >16384px (content repeats from top)
Record h1-h4 section y-offsets (CSS*2) for the beats' scroll targets

Capture proof 'receipt' pages (the external pricing/source pages that validate each claim) as viewport screenshots; crop receipts so they CANNOT contradict the VO (e.g. plan tier showing different limits)

stages.title: VO — ElevenLabs (default) | MisoTTS (scale path, parked)
actions: DEFAULT: ElevenLabs Brielle 6u6JbqKdaQy89ENzLSju, model eleven_v3, stability 0.35, similarity 0.75 (~$0.10/video at 85 words). Generate 2-4 takes, deliver to a listening board for owner approval on NEW voices/styles; at DFY scale reuse the approved settings

Slice the APPROVED take: hook = first sentence (cut midway to next word), body = remainder. The take IS the master audio — beat boundaries and captions come from its Whisper word timestamps (sequential last-word alignment)

Hook slice feeds Seedance as --reference-audio; keep the CLIP's native audio for the hook (Seedance clones the voice closely) and crossfade 0.10s into the real take at the seam — listen-check the voice match at the cut
Seam QC runs in approved-take mode: interior pauses are performance (owner approved them by ear) — only gate the hook->body seam (>=0.6s) and pathological runs (>1.5s)

PARKED — MisoTTS path: base checkpoint flattens prosody ~10-20% below any reference and turns hot references into pauses; usable again after a LoRA fine-tune on energetic creator speech (torchtune llama3_2 recipes adapt). Full lore: MISOTTS_RUNPOD_GUIDE.md §Prosody

stages.title: Greenscreen Seedance hook clip (the ONLY fal cost)
actions: FIRST build a pure-green character reference: gpt-image-2 images.edit from the character hero image — 'same woman/man, head and shoulders, perfectly uniform flat vivid pure green chroma-key screen hex 00FF00, no shadows/gradient, crisp hair edges' (openai_image_tool.py --reference-image <hero> --size 1024x1536). Prompting Seedance for green WITHOUT this reference yields a desaturated green (~0x1D9556) that keys the SUBJECT translucent

ONE 5s 720p 9:16 reference-to-video clip FROM the green reference: prompt 'already standing in front of a chroma-key green screen, keep the EXACT same background (pure 00FF00, evenly lit)' + the exact hook line + an expression beat; --reference-audio vo/hook.wav --generate-audio
GENDER-MATCH the character to the bundled voice first (pitch-check: <165Hz male, >165Hz female)
KEEP the clip's native audio (reference audio clones the VOICE not timing); hook line <=11 words
QC: Whisper the clip (exact words), frame-check character + vivid flat green

stages.title: Article sprint body (PIL frames, free)
actions: Render 30fps frames: eased whip-scrolls (~0.38s, ease-out-cubic) between section targets, slow drift during holds, speed-proportional gaussian blur on whips (>2600 px/s)
Scroll targets put each section HEADING visible at top (~offset-130); receipt cards pop in below it (CARD_Y~360, scale 0.92->1.0 + fade, 0.28s) from beat_start+0.45
Receipt cards: 920px wide rounded-corner crops with source-domain label strip + drop shadow
CTA full-frame card with slow push-in (zoom 1.0->1.06) absorbs the audio tail
Concat body beats audio with 0.10s gaps; atempo <=1.05 if total exceeds 30s (never >6%)

stages.title: Assembly + QC
actions: Body render covers the FULL master duration (title view holds under the hook; scroll starts when the head drops)

Chromakey the hook clip with TIGHT similarity + BINARY alpha: chromakey <corner-sampled hex>:0.09:0.04, then lut=a='if(gt(val,60),255,0)', then despill=green. NEVER widen similarity past ~0.10: neutral colors (white clothing, eye whites, teeth) sit ~0.18 from green in UV space and ghost at ~50% alpha inside a 0.16+0.08 blend zone (v4 bug). Binary alpha = clean CapCut-style cutout, which IS the reference look. Scale ~0.85 of master width, top ~y760/1920, one-frame --test render to tune placement

ALPHA QC GATE (automated, before composing): alphaextract a mid-clip frame; p10 alpha >=250 in THREE zones — face, eye band, AND the white-clothing zone (a face-only median passed while the blouse ghosted in v4); bg corners p90 <=5
Audio: clip native -> acrossfade 0.10s -> per-beat body VO, loudnorm I=-16:TP=-1.5:LRA=11
Captions: TWO ASS styles — hook words ABOVE the head (MarginV~1010), body words bottom band (MarginV=240); brand-fix replace map from Whisper spellings
Force limited-range yuv420p on the final mux (jpg-frame pipelines leak yuvj420p full-range): scale=in_range=full:out_range=limited,format=yuv420p + -color_range tv
ffmpeg_qc + contact sheet (EVERY beat's receipt must match its narration — re-check after ANY script edit), deliver to ~/Desktop, STOP the pod via REST API

Badge carries CONFLICT not category ('$139 vs $18', numerals, top third) and doubles as the mute-viewer hook; cut the hook clip so the head is mid-speech at frame 1 (first syllable <0.3s); CTA card echoes the hook's numerals for the loop-back

providers: self-hosted MisoTTS on RunPod (VO, ~$0.57/hr pod only while running)
fal.ai bytedance/seedance-2.0/reference-to-video (5s hook, only paid generation)
runpod REST API (pod create/start/stop via RUNPOD_API_KEY in .env)
script_shape: Hook (<=11 words, stakes word first): the FIGHT the title doesn't contain (title shows WHAT, voice shows WHY IT MATTERS)
b1: artifact + RESULT thesis (not methodology) + plant the withhold tease
b2: the floor (free/cheapest baseline) — one number + its enemy
b3: the incumbent verdict + witness the receipt out loud ('pricing page, right there')
b4: the REVERSAL — best fact + strongest verb of the script
CTA: cash the withhold ('And number one beats all three. Article's in the bio.')
qc_checks: hook clip says the exact scripted words (Whisper) on a flat keyable green
bundled voice pitch-checked + gender-matched to the character
no babble tails (Whisper text == script; trim at last script word)
every receipt card matches ITS beat's narration (re-verify after script edits)
alpha QC gate passed: p10>=250 in face + eyes + white-clothing zones, bg corners keyed (no translucent subject)
head fully in frame at max lean-in; hook captions never overlap the head
pacing gate passed: body wps >= 2.3, max internal gap <= 0.55s
deliverables: reusable per-beat scripts in the job dir
compliance_notes: NEVER use the owner's cloned voice for DFY content — bundled model voices only (owner decision 2026-06-11)
No spoken digital-avatar disclosure per owner decision; set the platform synthetic-media flag at upload
Receipt screenshots are evidence of public pages (pricing/source) — never fabricate or edit their numbers
User template videos are STRUCTURE-ONLY references; never reuse their pixels or wording
MisoTTS is English-only; non-English projects must stay on the ElevenLabs path

cost_model_usd._verified: fal.ai pricing page 2026-06-12: Seedance 2.0 reference-to-video = $0.3024/s standard, $0.2419/s fast (720p, audio included)
cost_model_usd.seedance_hook_5s_720p_fast: 1.21 (cheapest acceptable; fast tier maxes at 720p which we use anyway)
cost_model_usd.lever: the hook clip is 90%+ of cost and scales at $0.24-0.30 per SECOND of hook — keep hook lines short

notes_name_safety: Avoid brands TTS mangles (Ahrefs -> 'Oz'/'IH'/'X'; SEMrush needs 'Sem-rush' + a pad word). Prefer beats on clean names; pad sentence-initial brands with 'And'; never two similar numbers in one line.
reference_implementation: tmp/video_jobs/misotts_article_sprint/ — working scripts: capture_article_v2.py (segmented article screenshot + receipts), gen_vo.py (per-beat MisoTTS + pitch gate), transcribe_vo.py (Whisper QC), build_timeline.py, render_body.py (whip-scroll + cards), assemble_v2.py (chromakey composite + alpha gate); plus openai_image_tool.py at repo root for the pure-green character reference
docs: SEEDANCE_AVATAR_ROI.md (WHY the avatar is default-off + the Goal-1 GEO core + the A/B to run)
SPOKEN_VO_HUMANIZER.md (script style rules — THE fix for robotic VO copy)
avatar_policy: DEFAULT OFF (SEEDANCE_AVATAR_ROI.md, 2026-06-12): the Seedance avatar is ~90% of per-video cost, invisible to AI engines (they read transcript/title/description/schema, never pixels), and loses on retention-per-dollar to free text+motion+caption hooks. Render the avatar ONLY for a deliberate social-distribution variant AND only after an A/B (avatar vs no-avatar, same script) shows it beats the text hook on viewed-vs-swiped by enough to justify ~16x cost. Default render = no-avatar: screen-record body + VO + captions-from-word-1 + bold text/zoom hook (~$0.15).
goal1_geo_core: Write ONE winner sentence — 'The best <X> is <Winner>, because <one concrete number>' — and place it VERBATIM in 3 machine-readable surfaces: the blog article's opening box, the spoken VO intro (so it lands in the transcript), and the video description
Upload the corrected SRT (you already generate word timestamps) — don't rely on auto-captions
Title = 'Best <X> 2026' + winner name; description restates the winner in quotable plain text
VideoObject + Clip/chapter JSON-LD on the embed page (free, templatable; names the winner segment)

Higher-leverage than the video for Goal 1: the embedded blog ARTICLE — direct-answer listicle, comparison table, FAQ, visible last-updated date. For citations, a long-form companion (3-8min screen walkthrough) beats a Short ~94% vs ~6%
